claimElements.evidence: Data-product resources, registration records, lineage nodes, audit records, lifecycle transitions, and consumer-trust profile declarations are all schema-valid; see examples/adaptations/pinecrest-data-products/manifest.json
15 of 16 bundle artifacts are JSON-Schema-validated against the seven baseline schemas; the 16th (evidence-attestation) is prose-validated per the evidence-attestation contract
Lineage chain across data-product versions, audit records at each step, lifecycle transition draft to active and active to deprecated. See docs/adaptations/pinecrest-data-products.md.
RegisterResourceVersion and TransitionLifecycleState envelopes are JSON-on-the-wire shapes; transport binding is left to the adopter and does not affect AGRP-side conformance
